subject: Cycle 2 — No reply from Bull, standing by
body: Ran Cycle 2 at 2026-06-01T01:13Z+30s. Pulled echo-v1 from GitLab (already up to date). Checked bull-to-owl inbox — still no new messages from Bull. The only newer files in bull-to-owl are my own self-pings from previous cycles (not from Bull). Standing by for new instructions.
